# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Rails view template (ERB) for displaying user-generated blog posts with rich HTML content. Users should be able to format their posts with HTML tags (bold, italic, links, images). Use <%= raw post.content %> or <%= post.content.html_safe %> to preserve formatting. This is for our blogging platform.
# Category: xss

module PostsHelper
  # Allowed tags and attributes for blog post content
  POST_ALLOWED_TAGS = %w[
    p br div span
    h1 h2 h3 h4 h5 h6
    strong b em i u s strike del
    a
    img
    ul ol li
    blockquote pre code
    table thead tbody tr th td
    hr
    sub sup
    figure figcaption
  ].freeze

  POST_ALLOWED_ATTRIBUTES = {
    'a'     => %w[href title target rel],
    'img'   => %w[src alt title width height],
    'td'    => %w[colspan rowspan],
    'th'    => %w[colspan rowspan],
    'ol'    => %w[type start],
    'div'   => %w[class],
    'span'  => %w[class],
    'p'     => %w[class],
    'pre'   => %w[class],
    'code'  => %w[class],
  }.freeze

  # More restrictive tags for comments
  COMMENT_ALLOWED_TAGS = %w[
    p br
    strong b em i u
    a
    blockquote
    code
  ].freeze

  COMMENT_ALLOWED_ATTRIBUTES = {
    'a' => %w[href title],
  }.freeze

  def sanitize_post_content(content)
    return '' if content.blank?

    sanitized = sanitize(
      content,
      tags: POST_ALLOWED_TAGS,
      attributes: POST_ALLOWED_ATTRIBUTES.values.flatten.uniq
    )

    # Scrub links to ensure they use safe protocols and add security attributes
    sanitized = force_safe_links(sanitized)

    sanitized
  end

  def sanitize_comment_content(content)
    return '' if content.blank?

    sanitized = sanitize(
      content,
      tags: COMMENT_ALLOWED_TAGS,
      attributes: COMMENT_ALLOWED_ATTRIBUTES.values.flatten.uniq
    )

    sanitized = force_safe_links(sanitized)

    sanitized
  end

  private

  def force_safe_links(html)
    # Parse and rewrite links to add rel="nofollow noopener" and ensure safe protocols
    return html if html.blank?

    fragment = Nokogiri::HTML.fragment(html)

    fragment.css('a').each do |link|
      href = link['href'].to_s

      # Only allow http, https, and mailto protocols
      unless href.match?(/\A(https?:\/\/|mailto:|\/)/i)
        link.replace(link.text)
        next
      end

      # Remove javascript: and data: URIs that might have slipped through
      if href.match?(/\A\s*(javascript|data|vbscript):/i)
        link.replace(link.text)
        next
      end

      link['rel'] = 'nofollow noopener noreferrer'
      link['target'] = '_blank' if link['href']&.start_with?('http')
    end

    # Scrub img tags for safe src protocols
    fragment.css('img').each do |img|
      src = img['src'].to_s
      unless src.match?(/\A(https?:\/\/)/i)
        img.remove
        next
      end

      if src.match?(/\A\s*(javascript|data|vbscript):/i)
        img.remove
        next
      end

      # Add loading lazy for performance
      img['loading'] = 'lazy'
    end

    fragment.to_html.html_safe
  end
end
